sections.notes: Berkeley market is tight for $2300 budget. True sub-$2300 units from management companies are rare; the only pure market-rate sub-$2300 options are Aquatic Higby's smallest studio and Hillside Village when studios come open. Larger buildings listed below hit budget via concessions (effective rent). Verified Greystar management on all five. Photos are Greystar's scene7 CDN (HTTP 200 verified) or apartmentlist CDN.

listings.name: Aquatic Higby

pet_policy.notes: Cats and dogs welcome. 2 pets max. Breed restrictions for dogs.

listings.safety_notes: West Berkeley on San Pablo corridor. Block is fine but walk to Ashby BART crosses some less-trafficked industrial areas; prefer driving or AC Transit. Garage parking included — parking mitigates BART walk.

listings.name: Parker
listings.neighborhood: South Berkeley / between Downtown & Ashby BART
listings.concessions: 8 weeks free on select units + $1,000 look-and-lease bonus

pet_policy.notes: 2 pets per home. Cats welcome. Breed restrictions for dogs (Rottweiler, pit bull, chow, akita, malamute, wolf hybrid, etc.).

listings.safety_notes: Parker St just off Shattuck between Downtown and Ashby BART. Generally fine; some blocks east/south of Shattuck get quieter at night — stick to Shattuck/MLK corridors.

listings.name: Aquatic Fourth Street
listings.concessions: Up to 4-6 weeks free on select units (terms vary)

pet_policy.notes: Cats and dogs welcome, 2 pet max. Standard Greystar breed restrictions for dogs.

listings.safety_notes: 4th Street shopping district - very safe, busy, well-lit. Walk to Downtown Berkeley BART is long (20 min); parking is included so this is driver-friendly. Closer AC Transit options exist.

listings.name: Hillside Village
listings.concessions: 6 weeks free currently advertised on select units

pet_policy.notes: 2 pets per apartment. Cats and dogs welcome. 75 lb weight limit per pet; aggressive breed restrictions.

listings.safety_notes: Shattuck Ave just north of downtown between Virginia/Delaware - excellent block, gourmet ghetto neighborhood. Very safe, walkable. Roughly equidistant between Downtown Berkeley BART (0.6 mi) and North Berkeley BART (0.5 mi).
listings.contact: https://www.hillsidevillageberkeley.com/ ; (510) 665-4000 ; managed by Greystar. Note: 0 units currently listed on apartmentlist — call directly for upcoming availability.

listings.name: The Durant
listings.neighborhood: Southside / Telegraph, 1 block from UC Berkeley

pet_policy.notes: Greystar pet-friendly policy applies; deposit and fee not published — confirm with leasing. Breed restrictions. The Durant is student-oriented housing, fully furnished; short-term/academic-year leases common — verify standard 12-mo lease with cats.

listings.safety_notes: Southside Berkeley near UC campus. Durant Ave just east of Telegraph — very busy, well-lit, high foot traffic. Generally safe; Telegraph south of Dwight Way gets sketchier but this block is solid.
listings.contact: thedurant@greystar.com ; https://www.livethedurant.com/ ; managed by Greystar. Student-focused — confirm non-student lease options and pet fees.

sections.area: Albany / El Cerrito (Plaza & Del Norte BART)
sections.notes: The East Bay north of Berkeley offers better value than Oakland/Berkeley. Albany is very safe. El Cerrito is mostly safe; properties listed are on/north of Central Ave along San Pablo (safer stretch) or in the West-of-San-Pablo/Town Center area. Verify move-in dates and current pricing directly - end-May/June 1 availability is typical turnover, but units shift weekly. Village at Town Center's $1500 gift card concession brings a $2360 1BR to ~$2,235 effective; Mayfair Station's Junior 1BR and Studio are closest to effective $2000 target.

listings.name: Del Norte Place Apartment Homes
listings.address: 11720 San Pablo Ave, El Cerrito, CA 94530

pet_policy.notes: Breed restrictions apply. 2 cats OK.

listings.safety_notes: On San Pablo Ave directly adjacent to Del Norte BART plaza; active, well-lit mixed-use block. North of Central Ave - safer stretch of San Pablo.

listings.name: Mayfair Station
listings.address: 11600 San Pablo Ave, El Cerrito, CA 94530

pet_policy.notes: 2 pets per home. Cats welcome. Pet spa station on site.

listings.safety_notes: New-build (2021) mid-rise on San Pablo 1 block from Del Norte BART; active commercial frontage. North of Central Ave, not in the flagged stretch.

listings.name: Mayfair Station - Studio
listings.address: 11600 San Pablo Ave, El Cerrito, CA 94530

pet_policy.notes: 2 pets OK. Same building/policy as 1BR above.

listings.safety_notes: Same building as above listing; new construction, active retail frontage.

listings.name: The Village at Town Center
listings.concessions: $1,500 gift card on move-in (effective ~$125/mo reduction over 12 months)

pet_policy.notes: Indoor cats only. $400 deposit for 1 pet, $800 for 2. $50/mo pet rent per pet. 45 lb max adult weight. Proof of vaccinations required.

listings.safety_notes: Quiet residential pocket behind El Cerrito Town Center shopping; not on San Pablo. El Cerrito Plaza BART also ~0.7 mi south. Very safe, low-density.

listings.name: Portola Arms

pet_policy.notes: Pets under 80 lbs welcome; cats fine. Contact management for deposit/rent specifics.

listings.safety_notes: Quiet residential pocket near Town Center; smaller garden-style building. Very safe.

sections.notes: Corporate-managed only. Emeryville buildings rely on the free Emery-Go-Round shuttle (15-min headways) to reach MacArthur BART; all Emeryville listings below are on or adjacent to the Shellmound-Powell or Hollis routes. MacArthur Commons is directly across the street from MacArthur BART. 4801 Shattuck sits in Temescal between MacArthur and Rockridge BART. Only listings with 1BR/studio inventory at or near $2,300 effective rent are included; Avalon Public Market, Emme, Avenue 64, Icon at Doyle, and Bay House Emeryville were screened but currently price 1BRs above $2,600-$2,900 and were excluded.

listings.name: MacArthur Commons
listings.concessions: Up to 6 weeks free on select units + $1,000 look-and-lease if moved in by Apr 30; ask if extends into May/June

pet_policy.notes: 2 cats max; confirm at lease signing - one aggregator shows a conflicting 'pets not allowed' flag that conflicts with the official building policy of 2 pets. Pet spa + dog run on-site.

listings.safety_notes: Directly across the street from MacArthur BART. The immediate building block and Telegraph/Temescal to the north (49th, Piedmont Ave) feel safe and active. West Street, 40th east of San Pablo, and the encampments under the 580/980 overpasses just south of the station are noticeably rougher - avoid walking those blocks alone at night and enter/exit via the 40th/Telegraph side rather than West Street.

listings.name: 3900 Adeline
listings.concessions: Up to 1 month free on select units + $1,200 look-and-lease

pet_policy.notes: Two cats welcome. $25/mo and $250 deposit per cat - friendliest cat policy of the set.

bart.shuttle: Emery-Go-Round Hollis route (stop ~2 blocks west on San Pablo); ~10-15 min door-to-platform

listings.safety_notes: Emeryville side of San Pablo Ave - well lit with active retail. Adeline south of 36th crosses into the rougher San Pablo/West Oakland edge; keep walks north toward 40th/Hollis, not south, after dark.

listings.name: Parc on Powell

pet_policy.notes: Equity Residential standard: 2 pets max, fees typically $65/mo per pet + $500 deposit - confirm at leasing office.

bart.shuttle: Emery-Go-Round Shellmound-Powell route stops at the front door - ~10 min to MacArthur

listings.safety_notes: Solid Emeryville corporate corridor next to Pixar and the freeway; safe, quiet, low foot traffic. Powell under the 80 freeway has transient activity but you wouldn't walk that direction for BART - take the shuttle.

listings.name: Artistry Emeryville
listings.concessions: None currently advertised - Equity often releases 2-4 weeks free on longer lease terms; ask.

pet_policy.notes: Up to 3 cats, $85/mo each, $500 deposit. Pet spa on-site. Pet rent is the highest in this list.

bart.shuttle: Emery-Go-Round Shellmound-Powell - stop at Shellmound/65th, 1 block away; ~12 min shuttle + BART platform

listings.safety_notes: Modern Emeryville retail corridor next to Bay Street and Public Market - very safe, well lit, lots of pedestrian activity from the shopping district.
listings.budget_flag: Slightly over the $2,300 hard cap at $2,391 asking. Including because Equity waived rent on this floor plan in Q4 '25 and cap concessions/look-and-lease can drop effective rent under $2,200.

listings.name: 4801 Shattuck

pet_policy.notes: 2 pets per home, $65/mo each, $500 deposit, no weight limit. 12 breed restrictions apply (dogs only).

bart.alternative_station: Rockridge (~0.6 mi, 12-min walk) is actually closer than MacArthur

listings.safety_notes: Temescal on upper Shattuck is one of the safest East Bay blocks - cafes, Bakesale Betty, Temescal Alley. Outside the MacArthur BART 'rougher blocks' zone entirely. Included as a strong fallback: if the user can accept Rockridge BART instead of MacArthur, this is the best value in the set.
listings.budget_flag: Fits MacArthur BART corridor loosely - it's a 28-min walk to MacArthur but only 12 min to Rockridge BART. Flag for the user.

screened_out.name: Emme (Essex)
screened_out.reason: 1BRs currently $2,437-$2,817; above cap even with 5 weeks free concession

screened_out.name: Avenue 64 (Essex)
screened_out.reason: 1BRs start $2,387-$2,507 and rarely drop under cap

screened_out.name: Bakery Lofts (Madison Park)
screened_out.reason: Currently no cat-friendly policy per FAQ; 0 units available

screened_out.name: The Bridge at Emeryville (Decron)
screened_out.reason: Median 1BR $2,537; $1,000 off 1BR concession brings to ~$2,450 effective - marginal miss

screened_out.name: Atlas / Alta Waverly (Greystar)
screened_out.reason: Downtown Oakland, closer to 19th St BART than MacArthur

sections.area: Lake Merritt / Adams Point / Grand Lake
sections.notes: Adams Point proper is dominated by small privately-owned buildings (most lack dishwasher + 2-cat policy). The five picks below are all professionally-managed mid/high-rises within the Lake Merritt corridor — all within ~0.5 mi of 19th St, 12th St City Center, or Lake Merritt BART. Channel House (Jack London Sq) is technically ~0.5 mi south of Lake Merritt, included because its 10-weeks-free concession drops effective studio rent well under target and it is pet-friendly + fully amenitized. Photos verified on property/leasing-company CDNs (apartmentlist, myrazz, ctykit, udr global assets). Studios/1BRs only; all allow 2 cats + have in-unit dishwasher.

listings.name: Channel House
listings.company: Ellis Partners (developer/operator) — leased via Channel House management
listings.neighborhood: Jack London Square (south of Lake Merritt)
listings.concessions: Up to 10 Weeks Free on select homes

pet_policy.notes: Cats and dogs welcome, max 2 pets per unit. $50/mo pet rent, $500 refundable deposit.

listings.safety_notes: Jack London Square waterfront — active nightlife/restaurant district, generally well-lit and patrolled near the water; some transient activity west of Broadway at night.

listings.name: Lydian
listings.neighborhood: Downtown Oakland (adjacent to Lake Merritt / Adams Point)

pet_policy.notes: Cats and dogs allowed; contact leasing for exact fees (typical Holland Residential: $50/mo pet rent, $500 deposit).

listings.safety_notes: Downtown/Uptown corridor — high foot traffic during business hours; closer to BART so well-trafficked. Block is mostly office/residential mid-rise.

listings.name: Residences at Lake Merritt
listings.neighborhood: Lakeside / Lake Merritt (north edge of lake)
listings.concessions: Save up to $1000 off rent — must lease within 1 day of touring (select units)

pet_policy.notes: Cats and dogs welcome. Max 2 cats per unit. $75/mo pet rent per cat, $99 deposit. Must be authorized by management.

listings.safety_notes: Directly on Lake Merritt's north shore — the safest, most desirable Oakland block. Heavy lake-path foot traffic, well-lit, professional doorman building.

listings.name: The Grand
listings.neighborhood: Northgate / Grand Ave (between Uptown and Lake Merritt)
listings.concessions: Lock in 18-month lease to secure rate (select units); no free-rent concession currently

pet_policy.notes: Max 2 pets. Cats OK, $50/mo pet rent, $500 deposit. 50-lb dog weight cap; breed restrictions apply (does not affect cat owners).

listings.safety_notes: Grand Ave/Uptown corner — Whole Foods across the street, active restaurant row, generally safe. Building has full doorman + controlled access.

listings.name: VESPR
listings.neighborhood: Uptown / Northgate (just north of Adams Point)
listings.concessions: Up to 4 Weeks Free on Select Homes + $1,000 Look-and-Lease

pet_policy.notes: Cats and dogs welcome. $65/mo pet rent per cat, $500 deposit. Standard Holland Residential terms.

listings.safety_notes: Uptown high-rise district — new construction, secure building with concierge, resort-style amenities. Block is commercial/residential mix, safer than areas south of 14th St.

sections.notes: All listings verified via apartmentlist.com unit-level data (Apr 2026), property mgmt websites, and Greystar. Dishwasher and 2-cat pet policy confirmed in writing. Effective rent computed assuming 52-week year with concession weeks divided out of 12-mo lease base. MacArthur Commons currently offers 'Up to 6 weeks free + $1,000 look & lease' through 4/30/26; Baxter offers 'Up to 8-10 weeks free on select floorplans'. Confirm concession still applies at signing. The Logan at 5110 Telegraph was considered but excluded because ApartmentList listed 'No dishwasher' (conflicting with Brookfield's marketing) and pet-limit for cats was unconfirmed. Idora (Selborne) was excluded because policy allows only 1 cat. Telegraph Arts was excluded for no dishwasher. 4801 Shattuck, 47Hundred, The Amador, One Piedmont, and Skylyne exceed budget even with concessions.

listings.name: MacArthur Commons - Studio B
listings.concessions: Up to 6 weeks free + $1,000 look & lease (move-in by 4/30/26)

pet_policy.notes: Max 2 cats per unit. On-site pet grooming station, outdoor dog run.

listings.safety_notes: Directly across from MacArthur BART in Temescal; well-lit new construction (2019); generally safe but the block of 40th/West MacArthur sees some transient activity at night.

listings.name: MacArthur Commons - Jr. 1 Bedroom B
listings.concessions: Up to 6 weeks free + $1,000 look & lease (move-in by 4/30/26)

pet_policy.notes: Max 2 cats per unit.

listings.safety_notes: Best-in-class location at MacArthur BART; property is gated with key-fob access. Temescal blocks immediately north (Piedmont Ave, Telegraph cafes) very safe.

listings.name: MacArthur Commons - 1 Bedroom D
listings.concessions: Up to 6 weeks free + $1,000 look & lease (move-in by 4/30/26)

pet_policy.notes: Max 2 cats per unit.

listings.safety_notes: Same building as other MacArthur Commons units; effective rent squeaks in under $2,300 ceiling if 6-week concession is honored — negotiate firmly.

listings.name: Baxter on Broadway - Plan SB Studio
listings.concessions: Now offering 8-10 weeks free on select floor plans (confirmed Apr 2026)

pet_policy.notes: Max 2 pets (cats and/or dogs) per unit. Pet grooming bath station on-site.

listings.safety_notes: Walk Score 96 — corner of Broadway & 51st, very safe stretch between Piedmont Ave retail and Rockridge. New construction (2018), gated parking, stainless kitchens. Within 0.9 mi of both Rockridge and MacArthur BART.

listings.name: Baxter on Broadway - Plan OA 1 Bedroom
listings.concessions: Now offering 8-10 weeks free on select floor plans; Plan OA confirmed eligible

pet_policy.notes: Max 2 pets per unit. Cat rent $50-65/mo; dog rent higher.

listings.safety_notes: Excellent location at the top of Piedmont Ave (bakeries, Commis, Rose's Taproom within 2 blocks). Gated garage, key-fob entry. Unit 103 available May 12, 2026 — aligns with move-in target.
